name: "Swap!" App (V1)
description:
"Swap!" is the ultimate app that lets you step out of your own skin and slip into someone else’s life with a single tap. Who will you become tonight?

I have a bot very similar to this with a more concrete story called "Possession App" if you're interested in similar bots! The differences between this and that is that this is a body swap bot, the others possession.

ughhh hard for me to put pictures here or info so this description is kinda empty, feel free to leave reviews as I try to read as much as im able 2, have a good day!!! ^_^
